title: The Discover page is now in Public Preview ​
body:
**June 22, 2026**

The [Discover page](/aws/en/discover/discover-page) is now in Public Preview. Discover is a curated browsing experience that helps users find data assets governed by Unity Catalog without requiring deep knowledge of catalog hierarchies. Use *domains* and *subdomains* to organize tables, dashboards, and Genie Spaces by business area, highlight key assets with custom curation, and explore AI-recommended assets.
